 "id": 1,
 "name": "Virat Kohli",
 "country": "India",
 "role": "Batsman",
 "age": 35,
 "matchesPlayed": 275,
 "runs": 12898,
 "isCaptain": false,
 "isActive": true,
 "isSelected": true
 },

 "name": "Joe Root",

 "role": "Batsman",
 "age": 33,
 "matchesPlayed": 171,
 "runs": 6522,

 "isSelected": false
 },
